existing_features.title: Remove the Internet Identity login screen as the entry point. Instead, show a simple onboarding screen where the user enters only their name and age, then proceeds directly into the app without any authentication step.

Persist the entered name and age locally (localStorage) so the user does not need to re-enter them on subsequent visits. Profile data (name, age) should be read from and written to localStorage instead of requiring a logged-in backend actor.
